name: Mr Bates vs The Post Office
original_name: Mr Bates vs The Post Office
overview: The story of one of the greatest miscarriages of justice in British legal history, where hundreds of innocent sub-postmasters and postmistresses were wrongly accused of theft, fraud and false accounting due to a defective IT system.
